response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of development experience and genuine developer-tooling interests (test runners, CI infrastructure, MCP code generators, testing libraries), but the role is a people-management position and the resume shows no people management, no formal technical leadership roles, and no organizational change experience. The developer-tools work is largely side projects and infrastructure tasks rather than 3 sustained years on tooling teams, and mobile experience is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint. The core management requirements are unmet.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software development experience, well beyond the 8-year minimum
Authentic developer-tooling and testing-infrastructure background (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, Selenium training)
Teaching and community leadership through workshops, courses, and code katas suggests mentorship aptitude
concerns: No people management or formal team leadership experience, versus the required 2+ years
No demonstrated 3 years in a technical leadership role or leading organizational change
Mobile-platform exposure is thin and dated (one iOS/Apple TV project in 2015-2016)

key_factors.factor: Lacks formal technical leadership track record
